title: Verify the welcome screen displays correctly
test_steps: Open the Forever 21 mobile app. | Verify the status bar at the top shows various icons and the time (8:52). | Verify the large image of a person wearing a Forever 21 outfit is displayed. | Verify the text "FOREVER 21" is prominently displayed in the center of the image. | Verify the text "GET APP EXCLUSIVES" is shown below the image. | Verify the text "Enable Push Notifications in the Inbox for the lowdown on awesome sales and perks!" is displayed. | Verify the "Sign In Forever 21 Account" button is present at the bottom. | Verify the "Skip" option is present to the right of the sign-in button.
expected_result: The status bar displays correctly. | The large image of a person wearing a Forever 21 outfit is displayed. | The text "FOREVER 21" is prominently displayed in the center of the image. | The text "GET APP EXCLUSIVES" is shown below the image. | The text "Enable Push Notifications in the Inbox for the lowdown on awesome sales and perks!" is displayed. | The "Sign In Forever 21 Account" button is present at the bottom. | The "Skip" option is present to the right of the sign-in button.

title: Verify the "Sign In Forever 21 Account" button is clickable
test_steps: Open the Forever 21 mobile app. | Click on the "Sign In Forever 21 Account" button.
expected_result: The app navigates to the sign-in screen.

title: Verify the "Skip" option is clickable
test_steps: Open the Forever 21 mobile app. | Click on the "Skip" option.
expected_result: The app navigates to the next screen.

title: Verify the welcome screen is accessible
test_steps: Open the Forever 21 mobile app. | Use accessibility tools to verify the welcome screen is accessible.

title: Verify the welcome screen is usable
test_steps: Open the Forever 21 mobile app. | Verify the welcome screen is easy to navigate and understand.
expected_result: The welcome screen is easy to navigate and understand.
